subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Who speaketh the truth and summoneth the people unto the straight path. Verily, We have, on this day, turned toward the station [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان الذی ینطق بالحق و یدع الناس الی سوآء السبیل انا توجهنا الیوم الی مقام
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @praise and encouragement, @thankfulness; gratitude
